case_title: CHEN, JAMIE VS FURNITURE AHEAD INC. DBA IEXPRESS HOME FURNISHINGS et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAR-07-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-30-2006 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PLAINTIFF SIGNED A DECLARATION, DEFENDANT NOT SERVED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEDYC, PIERRE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FURNITURE AHEAD INC. DBA IEXPRESS HOME FURNISHINGS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, JAMIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FURNITURE AHEAD INC. DBA IEXPRESS HOME FURNISHINGS LEDYC, PIERRE THE COURT ORDERS SPECIFIC PERFORMANCES OF THE AGREEMENT TO PURCHASE THE SUBJECT SOFA; DEFT SHALL MAKE ARRANGEMENT AT PLFT'S CONVENIENCE, FOR DELIVERY TO PLFT AT A LOCATION TO BE DETERMINED BY PLFT, WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS JUDGMENT. DEFT PIERRE LEDYC IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS IMPROPERLY NAMED AS A PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COURTESY COPY TO SMALL CLAIMS OF CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFT FURNITURE AHEAD INC, ET AL TO PLTF JAMIE CHEN INQUIRING RE CONVENIENT DATE OF DELIVERY OF
SOFA IN COMPLIANCE WITH THE CONDITION OF THE JUDGEMENT.
